title: Support score root base model and verbosity in frontier variants
description: Update the model performance frontier procedure to support score YAMLs with root base_model_name and verbosity fields, including Project Type AI style LangGraphScore configs.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Found Project Type AI root fields: model_provider, model_name, base_model_name, reasoning_effort, verbosity, max_tokens. Updating frontier variant planning so base_model_name tracks model_name by default and verbosity is a first-class parameter_set field.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Completed Project Type AI compatibility update.

Changes:
- Added first-class root `base_model_name` and `verbosity` support to model frontier variants.
- If a score already has `base_model_name`, candidate `model_name` updates now keep `base_model_name` in sync unless explicitly overridden.
- Updated procedure candidate_matrix description, README example, and tests for Project Type AI style YAML.

Validation:
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/test_model_frontier_runtime.py` -> 11 passed
- `python -m py_compile plexus/cli/procedure/model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py` -> passed
- Procedure YAML safe-load check for base_model_name/verbosity docs -> passed
